label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a partner at the start of the song. Their partners are: - Alice with Helga - Bob with Jamie - Claire with Ophelia - Dave with Karl - Eve with Rodrigo Now, throughout the song, they switch partners multiple times. Let me try to track each switch step by step. It might help to write down the current partners after each switch. First, the initial pairings: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Jamie 3. Claire - Ophelia 4. Dave - Karl 5. Eve - Rodrigo Now, the first switch is Eve and Bob switching partners. So, Eve was with Rodrigo, and Bob was with Jamie. After switching, Eve will be with Jamie, and Bob will be with Rodrigo. Let's update the list: After first switch (Eve and Bob): 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Rodrigo 3. Claire - Ophelia 4. Dave - Karl 5. Eve - Jamie Next, Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave was with Karl, Claire was with Ophelia. After switching: Dave will be with Ophelia, Claire will be with
